config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because that is how abuse of power starts. From my perspective, a healthy society is built by protecting personal freedom, dignity, and due process, while still allowing limits when there is a clear harm to others. In practice, I would only accept society taking priority in narrow, well-justified cases, not as a general rule.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami sendiri menunjukkan bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak ruang atas nama "kebaikan bersama", hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, diskriminasi, dan pembatasan kebebasan yang sulit dibalik. Hak individu memang bukan absolut dalam semua keadaan, tetapi pembatasannya harus ketat, transparan, dan benar-benar untuk mencegah kerugian nyata pada orang lain, bukan sekadar karena mayoritas merasa lebih nyaman. Masyarakat yang sehat justru bergantung pada perlindungan hak individu, karena tanpa itu "kepentingan masyarakat" mudah berubah menjadi alasan untuk menekan yang lemah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual, because that kind of logic can easily be used to excuse abuse of power. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how appeals to harmony, order, or the common good can sometimes silence criticism and pressure minorities, so I am cautious about giving society the upper hand as a general rule. Individual rights should be protected first, with limits only when there is clear, direct harm to others and the restriction is truly necessary. A good society is not one that crushes the individual for the majority, but one that balances public welfare with dignity, freedom, and fair process.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis didahulukan atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan kebebasan, terutama ketika mayoritas atau negara merasa paling tahu apa yang terbaik. Hak individu memang bisa dibatasi, tetapi hanya ketika ada bahaya nyata pada orang lain dan pembatasannya benar-benar perlu, bukan sekadar karena masyarakat ingin ketertiban atau kenyamanan. Justru masyarakat yang sehat bergantung pada perlindungan hak individu, karena tanpa itu kepentingan publik mudah berubah menjadi alat penindasan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically outrank the rights of the individual, because in Indonesia that kind of thinking can easily slide into pressure to conform and silence people who are already vulnerable. I understand the appeal of order, harmony, and the common good, but those values lose their moral force if they are used to justify weak protections for dissent, minorities, or due process. Society is strongest when individual rights are treated as the default and only limited in narrow cases where there is clear harm to others and the restriction is truly necessary. To me, “society first” sounds too vague and too easy to abuse unless it is tightly constrained by law and accountability.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai sebagai alasan utama, itu sering berujung pada penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, diskriminasi, dan pengekangan kebebasan yang sulit dibalik. Memang ada situasi ketika hak individu perlu dibatasi, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, transparan, dan berdasarkan bahaya nyata terhadap orang lain, bukan sekadar demi ketertiban atau kenyamanan mayoritas. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru bergantung pada perlindungan hak individu, karena tanpa itu “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi alat untuk menekan yang lemah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
